query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_authors,
  SUM(CASE WHEN s3AvatarUrl IS NOT NULL AND s3AvatarUrl != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_s3_avatar,
  SUM(CASE WHEN s3AvatarUrl LIKE '%drive-%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as from_drive_reseed,
  SUM(CASE WHEN s3AvatarUrl IS NULL OR s3AvatarUrl = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as missing_avatar
FROM author_profiles;
command:

  SUM(CASE WHEN s3AvatarUrl IS NOT NULL AND s3AvatarUrl != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_s3_avatar,
  SUM(CASE WHEN s3AvatarUrl LIKE '%drive-%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as from_drive_reseed,
  SUM(CASE WHEN s3AvatarUrl IS NULL OR s3AvatarUrl = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as missing_avatar
FROM author_profiles;
